  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/1032419366/v0.1.3</id>
    <updated>2026-07-14T13:17:31Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/releases/tag/v0.1.3"/>
    <title>v0.1.3</title>
    <content type="html"><p>This release ships everything merged to <code>main</code> since v0.1.1 (March 2026): two new adapters, parallel proposal generation, reflection-cost controls, a unified LM layer, dependency security bumps, and a large expansion of the docs and showcase.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="pip install -U gepa"><pre>pip install -U gepa</pre></div>
<h2>Highlights</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>LangChain adapter</strong> — optimize LangChain/LangGraph applications directly with <code>gepa.optimize</code> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4525354082" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/issues/361" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/gepa-ai/gepa/pull/361/hovercard" href="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/pull/361">#361</a>, <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/bryonkucharski/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/bryonkucharski">@bryonkucharski</a>). Install with <code>pip install 'gepa[langchain]'</code>.</li>
<li><strong>ConfidenceAdapter</strong> — logprob-aware scoring and reflection for classification tasks (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4084439780" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/issues/258" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/gepa-ai/gepa/pull/258/hovercard" href="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/pull/258">#258</a>, <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/rodolfo-nobrega/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/rodolfo-nobrega">@rodolfo-nobrega</a>). Install with <code>pip install 'gepa[confidence]'</code>.</li>
<li><strong>Reflection-cost controls</strong> — new <code>max_reflection_cost</code> budget knob, with cost/token tracking moved into a unified LM layer (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4245640717" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/issues/327" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/gepa-ai/gepa/pull/327/hovercard" href="https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa/pull/327">#327</a>, <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4243260900" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url
